---
title: Note Title
description: One-sentence summary of the idea, experiment, or project update.
---

# Note Title

**Published:** YYYY-MM-DD

## Context

Describe the problem, motivation, or current project state.

## What Changed

- Summarize the idea, experiment, or progress.
- Explain tradeoffs and open questions.
- Link to relevant docs or code where helpful.

## What Comes Next

- List the next milestone or unanswered questions.
- Mention whether the work is experimental, stable, or still in flux.
